pages.raw_text:
The big features of the irrigation
congress will be the two parades
the first the parade of progress
on next Tuesday afternoon and the
second the Illuminated parade on
Wednesday night


The parade of progress will give
an categorical representation of the
progress of the west from the days
of the Indians until the present
and will give types in the parade
from the different eras in the
march of progress. There will be
real Indians, cowboys and other
specimens of early day life on the
plains. A number of bands from
different places will be in line, as
the expense of such bands to and
from Spokane is guaranteed by the
irrigation board. The illuminated
parade will contain nearly all of
the features of the day parade,
with the adde charm of torchlight,
roman candle and other light eff
fects.
